info.name: Silicon Valley Trail - Comprehensive API Scenarios

request.description: Creates the main test account. If it already exists, expect a handled error response.
Logs in the primary user and stores the JWT into {{jwt}}.

exec: const token = data.token || data.jwt || data.jwtToken || data.accessToken;

request.description: Secondary account for no-save and alternate-user scenarios.
Optional. This overwrites {{jwt}} with the secondary user token.

exec: const token = data.token || data.jwt || data.jwtToken || data.accessToken;

request.description: Starts a new game for the current user.
Loads the active save and re-surfaces a pending event if one exists.

item.name: Start game when one may already be in progress

request.description: Expected to return a handled error if the current user already has an IN_PROGRESS game.

item.name: Find game when a save exists

request.description: Deletes the current user's active game.

item.name: Find game after delete / no-save state
Action while event is pending (should fail)

request.description: Use after travel created a pending event. Expected: handled error to resolve the event first.

item.name: Resolve event when no event is pending (should fail)

request.description: Wrong field name on purpose to test validation / binding behavior.
Auth explicitly disabled for this request.
Forces an invalid bearer token for this request.

exec: pm.request.auth = { type: "bearer", bearer: [{ key: "token", value: pm.collectionVariables.get("badToken"), type: "string" }] };

item.name: 05 - Alternate User / No Saved Game Scenarios

exec: const token = data.token || data.jwt || data.jwtToken || data.accessToken;

item.name: Find game for secondary user (expected no save yet)

request.description: Restores {{jwt}} back to the primary user after alternate-user testing.

exec: const token = data.token || data.jwt || data.jwtToken || data.accessToken;
